operators.label: Equals
operators.description: Property equals this value (use quotes for text).

operators.label: Not equals
operators.description: Property does not equal this value.

operators.label: Less than
operators.description: Numeric property is less than this value.

operators.label: Less or equal
operators.description: Numeric property is less than or equal to this value.

operators.label: Greater than
operators.description: Numeric property is greater than this value.

operators.label: Greater or equal
operators.description: Numeric property is greater than or equal to this value.

operators.label: Value in list
operators.description: Scalar property is one of the values in this JSON array.

operators.label: Value not in list
operators.description: Scalar property is not in this JSON array.

operators.label: List includes
operators.description: Property must be a list (array); true if the list contains this value. Not substring search.

operators.label: List excludes
operators.description: Property must be a list; true if the list does not contain this value.

operators.label: Text matches pattern
operators.description: String property matches this regex. For “contains text”, use a substring like "@gmail.com" (escape dots: \.).

operators.label: Text does not match
operators.description: String property does not match this regex pattern.
